narrative:
Tipp City Ex Vill Sd (Miami) exempted village school district has 11,762 registered voters, with 48.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.4 percentage points.
